TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: uzai ka sitsuayan a naqemaɫup a tsautsau.
S.PHON: uzai ka siʦuajan a naqəmaʎup a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: uzai ka sicuayan a naqemaljup a caucau.
S.PHON: uzai ka siʦuajan a naqəmaʎup a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time there were some people who had been hunting.

S.FORM: manu qudjaɫan.
S.PHON: manu quɉaʎan.
S.FORM: manu qudjaljan.
S.PHON: manu quɉaʎan.

S.FORM: qau vaik a siuɫai a sema tjua ɫiv nua qatsiɫay.
S.PHON: qau vaik a siuʎai a səma cua ʎiv nua qaʦiʎaj.
S.FORM: qau vaik a siuljai a sema tjua ljiv nua qaciljay.
S.PHON: qau vaik a siuʎai a səma ʦua ʎiv nua qaʦiʎaj.
S.TRANSL: and went to stay overnight in a rock cave.

S.FORM: manu meqatsa a qudjaɫ; tsaɫeneq a qatsiɫay.
S.PHON: manu məqaʦa a quɉaʎ; ʦaʎənəq a qaʦiʎaj.
S.FORM: manu meqaca a qudjalj; caljeneq a qaciljay.
S.PHON: manu məqaʦa a quɉaʎ; ʦaʎənəq a qaʦiʎaj.
S.TRANSL: The rain got heavier, and the rock creaked.

S.FORM: manu "ki tjuqtjuqi anga itjen nua qatsiɫay," aya azua matsidiɫ.
S.PHON: manu "ki cuqcuqi aŋa icən nua qaʦiʎaj," aja azua maʦidiʎ.
S.FORM: manu "ki tjuqtjuqi anga itjen nua qaciljay," aya azua macidilj.
S.PHON: manu "ki ʦuqʦuqi aŋa iʦən nua qaʦiʎaj," aja azua maʦidiʎ.
S.TRANSL: “We’ll be crushed by the rock,” said one.

S.FORM: "ini kuda.
S.PHON: "ini kuda.
S.FORM: "ini kuda.
S.PHON: "ini kuda.

S.FORM: ku tsukesaw anga tua ku veɫatan," aya matsidiɫ; qau tsukesen.
S.PHON: ku ʦukəsaw aŋa tua ku vəʎatan," aja maʦidiʎ; qau ʦukəsən.
S.FORM: ku cukesaw anga tua ku veljatan," aya macidilj; qau cukesen.
S.PHON: ku ʦukəsaw aŋa tua ku vəʎatan," aja maʦidiʎ; qau ʦukəsən.
S.TRANSL: I’ll prop it up with my bow,” said another one, and propped it up.

S.FORM: manu ini tezeng a veɫatan.
S.PHON: manu ini təzəŋ a vəʎatan.
S.FORM: manu ini tezeng a veljatan.
S.PHON: manu ini təzəŋ a vəʎatan.
S.TRANSL: But the bow couldn’t take the weight.

S.FORM: qau tjuqtjuqen tiamadju a naqemereng itjua ɫiv nua qatsiɫay.
S.PHON: qau cuqcuqən tiamaɉu a naqəmərəŋ icua ʎiv nua qaʦiʎaj.
S.FORM: qau tjuqtjuqen tiamadju a naqemereng itjua ljiv nua qaciljay.
S.PHON: qau ʦuqʦuqən tiamaɉu a naqəməRəŋ iʦua ʎiv nua qaʦiʎaj.
S.TRANSL: Those who were lying in the rock cave were crushed.

S.FORM: matsay anga tiamadju a mapuɫat.
S.PHON: maʦaj aŋa tiamaɉu a mapuʎat.
S.FORM: macay anga tiamadju a mapuljat.
S.PHON: maʦaj aŋa tiamaɉu a mapuʎat.

S.FORM: qau avan anga kinasengatsan a kakevikevingan a kakurakurapan, a naqemereng i tsasaw tua ɫiv nua qatsiɫay, tu tjinuqtjuq anga tiamadju, a tjemumaɫ tua i tjumaq a tsautsau.
S.PHON: qau avan aŋa kinasəŋaʦan a kakəvikəviŋan a kakurakurapan, a naqəmərəŋ i ʦasaw tua ʎiv nua qaʦiʎaj, tu cinuqcuq aŋa tiamaɉu, a cəmumaʎ tua i cumaq a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: qau avan anga kinasengacan a kakevikevingan a kakurakurapan, a naqemereng i casaw tua ljiv nua qaciljay, tu tjinuqtjuq anga tiamadju, a tjemumalj tua i tjumaq a caucau.
S.PHON: qau avan aŋa kinasəŋaʦan a kakəvikəviŋan a kakuRakuRapan, a naqəməRəŋ i ʦasaw tua ʎiv nua qaʦiʎaj, tu ʦinuqʦuq aŋa tiamaɉu, a ʦəmumaʎ tua i ʦumaq a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: It was the people who were shunned because of having the itch and skin disease, who were lying outside the rock cave, who told the people back at home that they had been crushed.

S.FORM: avan sika imatsatsukes ayain anga.
S.PHON: avan sika imaʦaʦukəs ajain aŋa.
S.FORM: avan sika imacacukes ayain anga.
S.PHON: avan sika imaʦaʦukəs ajain aŋa.
S.TRANSL: That’s why the place Stone Gate is called Propped Up.
